Description: The part number is identifying for a part, it combines the variants of a part. In the case of part variants, the combination of part number and variant designation is the identifier. During entry as many characters as you wish are possible for the part number, but only the first 96 characters in the UTF-8 format are identifying.
Outputs the type number of the part entered in parts management on the "Properties" tab > hierarchy level "General".
Short name of the manufacturer.
Short name of the supplier.

Property of a part variant. Shows the designation of the variant, up to 3 characters may be entered. A part always has at least one variant. By default, the variant designation "1" is assigned to the first variant of each part.

Outputs the product subgroup entered in parts management on the "Properties" tab > hierarchy level "General" > "Product grouping" property. The parts are sorted according to their product groups (including superseding and subgroups) and displayed in tree format in parts management.

Outputs the product group entered in parts management on the "Properties" tab > hierarchy level "General" > "Product grouping" property. The parts are sorted according to their product groups (including superseding and subgroups) and displayed in tree format in parts management.

Unique part number of an external ERP system or PDM system. The ERP / PDM numbers must be unique for different parts. Same values are also permitted for the properties "ERP / PDM number 1" to "ERP / PDM number 10" at a part. Any number of characters can be entered for the ERP / PDM number. However, only the first 64 characters in UTF-8 format are identifying. If you assign a value via the Application Programming Interface you have to specify the same value for all part variants.

Outputs the generic product group entered in parts management on the "Properties" tab > hierarchy level "General" > "Product grouping" property. The parts are sorted according to their product groups (including superseding and subgroups) and displayed in tree format in parts management.
Full name of the manufacturer.
Full name of the supplier.
Identifies the part as a discontinued part; such a part is no longer to be used.

In this property the classification of a part into "Generic product group", "Product group" and "Product subgroup" is made in the parts management in the tab "Properties" > Hierarchy level "General". The classification is displayed here like the directory path in a breadcrumb trail (e.g. "Electrical engineering > Cable > General").
Outputs all ERP / PDM numbers and their descriptions.
